item.title: 苹果内置摄像头 AirPods 或 9 月发布
item.guid: 苹果内置摄像头-AirPods-或-9-月发布
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Apple's built-in camera AirPods, currently under development, have entered the late stages of development. Prototypes are now in DVT (Design Validation Test), which is the final major development phase before mass production, and are expected to be released as early as September alongside AI Siri. 据彭博社报道，苹果正在研发的内置摄像头 AirPods 已进入开发后期阶段，原型机目前处于 DVT（设计验证测试）环节，这是量产前的最后一个主要开发阶段，预计最快于 9 月随 AI Siri 一同发布。

Reporter Mark Gurman stated that both the left and right earbuds of this headset have built-in cameras, used to collect low-resolution visual information about the user's surroundings, for Siri to process and provide relevant responses. The cameras do not have photo or video recording capabilities; they primarily serve as Siri's "eyes." 记者 Mark Gurman 称，该款耳机的左右两侧耳塞均内置摄像头，用于采集用户周围环境的低分辨率视觉信息，供 Siri 处理并提供相关回应。摄像头并不具备拍照或录像功能，主要作为 Siri 的「眼睛」使用。

In terms of appearance, the new product will be similar to AirPods Pro 3, but with a longer stem to accommodate the camera module. To address privacy concerns, Apple has built an LED indicator into the earbuds, which will light up when visual data is uploaded to the cloud. 外观上，新品将与 AirPods Pro 3 相近，但耳柄更长以容纳摄像头模组。针对隐私问题，苹果在耳塞上内置了一颗 LED 指示灯，将在视觉数据上传至云端时亮起。

This headset was previously planned for release in the first half of this year, but was delayed due to the postponement of Siri's refactoring work, and is now expected to be released in September. Gurman also pointed out that Apple internally still has concerns about the quality of AI visual features, and if the related experience fails to meet expected standards, the release date may be further postponed. 这款耳机此前计划于今年上半年发布，但因 Siri 重构工作延期而推迟，目前预计于 9 月发布。Gurman 还指出，苹果内部对 AI 视觉功能的质量仍存有顾虑，若相关体验未能达到预期标准，发布时间可能进一步推迟。

item.title: OpenAI 发布三款实时语音模型
item.guid: OpenAI-发布三款实时语音模型
item.description:
Today, OpenAI released three real-time speech models, targeting three scenarios: speech inference, real-time translation, and streaming transcription: 今天，OpenAI 发布三款实时语音模型，分别针对语音推理、实时翻译和流式转录三类场景：

    GPT-Realtime-2: Builds voice agents that can be used in production environments. They can think more deeply, perform actions, handle interruptions, and keep conversations flowing naturally;

    GPT-Realtime-Translate: Supports real-time translation for over 70 input languages and 13 output languages, breaking down language barriers and helping people communicate more naturally;

    GPT-Realtime-Whisper: Real-time transcription of audio streams, generating subtitles and annotations.

Among them, GPT-Realtime-2 is equipped with "GPT-5 level reasoning capabilities," designed specifically for voice interaction scenarios, capable of handling complex requests, multi-threaded calls to external tools, responding to user interruptions, and maintaining natural and fluent conversations during continuous dialogue. 其中，GPT-Realtime-2 搭载「GPT-5 级别的推理能力」，专为语音交互场景设计，能够在持续对话过程中处理复杂请求、多线程调用外部工具、应对用户中断，并保持对话的自然流畅。

All three models are now available to developers via the OpenAI Realtime API and can be tested in the OpenAI Playground. 三款模型均已通过 OpenAI Realtime API 向开发者开放，并可在 OpenAI Playground 中进行测试。

🔗 Related reading: Finally, GPT-5 can speak human language to me 🔗 相关阅读： 终于能听 GPT-5 给我说人话了

item.title: 曝苹果考虑取消入门款 MacBook Neo，起售价或上涨 100 美元
item.guid: 曝苹果考虑取消入门款-MacBook-Neo，起售价或上涨-100-美元
item.description:
Recently, tech columnist Tim Culpan reported in his Culpium newsletter that Apple is considering discontinuing the 256GB entry-level MacBook Neo to cope with rising chip and DRAM costs, effectively increasing the price by $100. 日前，科技专栏作者 Tim Culpan 在其 Culpium 通讯中报道称，苹果正在考虑取消 256GB 入门款的 MacBook Neo，以应对芯片与 DRAM 成本上升，变相涨价 100 美元。

According to MacRumors, Apple may also introduce new color options on top of the price increase to maintain market interest, but no specific plan has been finalized yet. Due to demand far exceeding expectations, Apple had previously asked suppliers to increase production targets to 10 million units, roughly double the initial forecast of 5 to 6 million units. 另据 MacRumors 的报道，苹果还可能在涨价的基础上推出新配色来维持市场热度，但目前仍未敲定具体方案。由于需求远超预期，苹果此前已要求供应商将产能目标提升至 1000 万台，约为最初预测 500 至 600 万台的两倍。

Not long ago, Apple quietly removed the 512GB memory option for Mac Studio and the 256GB storage option for Mac mini from its official website, with the latter's starting price rising to 5999 yuan. 就在不久前，苹果已悄悄在官网撤下 Mac Studio 的 512GB 内存选项和 Mac mini 的 256GB 存储选项，后者的起售价涨到 5999 元。

item.title: Switch 2 卖得越多亏得越多，任天堂股价连跌 5 个月创十年最长纪录
item.guid: Switch-2-卖得越多亏得越多，任天堂股价连跌-5-个月创十年最长纪录
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Nintendo is facing continuous pressure from the capital market. Nintendo's stock price has fallen for 5 consecutive months, marking its longest losing streak since 2016, with a cumulative decline of over 30% year-to-date. 据彭博社报道，任天堂正面临来自资本市场的持续压力。任天堂股价已连续 5 个月下跌，创下 2016 年以来最长连跌纪录，年初至今累计跌幅超过 30%。

It is worth noting that Nintendo's actual business performance is not bad. Since its launch in June last year, Switch 2's sales speed has continuously surpassed that of any home game console in history; "Pokémon Pokopia" sold 2.2 million copies in 4 days of its launch; "The Super Mario Bros. Movie" global box office has approached $900 million. 值得注意的是，任天堂的实际业务表现并不差。Switch 2 自去年 6 月上市以来，销售速度持续超越历史上任何一款家用游戏主机；《宝可梦 Pokopia》上线 4 天售出 220 万份；《超级马力欧银河大电影》全球票房已逼近 9 亿美元。

Affected by multiple factors such as rising memory prices, investors generally believe that Nintendo is currently selling hardware at a loss. Fluctuations in the Japanese yen exchange rate have further exacerbated cost pressures. The report suggests that a price increase for Switch 2 is only a matter of time. 受内存涨价等多重因素影响，投资者普遍认为任天堂目前正在亏本销售硬件。日元汇率波动进一步加剧了成本压力。报道认为，Switch 2 的涨价只是时间问题。

The report estimates that the price increase will be between $50 and $100. If the price adjustment is implemented, the official price of Switch 2 may approach 4000 RMB. Analyst Hideki Yasuda stated that Nintendo's stock price will remain under pressure until the price adjustment takes effect. 报道预计，此次涨幅在 50 至 100 美元之间，若调价落地，Switch 2 官方售价或将接近 4000 元人民币。分析师 Hideki Yasuda 表示，在价格调整落地之前，任天堂股价将持续承压。

item.title: 鸿蒙微信发布 8.0.17.36 新版，带来一大波新功能
item.guid: 鸿蒙微信发布-8.0.17.36-新版，带来一大波新功能
item.description:
Yesterday, the HarmonyOS version of WeChat pushed the official 8.0.17.36 (8392996) update. The official log simply stated "fixed some known issues," but actual testing revealed a wave of new features, summarized below based on IT Home's report: 昨天，鸿蒙版微信推送 8.0.17.36（8392996）正式版更新，官方日志一句话「修复了一些已知问题」带过，实测带来一大波新功能，结合 IT 之家报道汇总如下：

    Video Accounts: Supports search, registration, and profile modification; landscape videos support gravity-sensing rotation; supports double-tap to like;

    Listen: Added "Song Production" and "Music Space," supporting AI songwriting and AI cover songs (expected to be a grayscale feature);

    Long-press icon shortcut adds "My QR Code"; chat input box adds speech-to-text shortcut button;

    Large profile pictures support viewing the previous one; after quoting a picture, you can swipe left and right to view previous and subsequent pictures;

    Wallet adds Apple service deduction management; friend transfers support choosing to deposit into WeChat Pay Balance or Lingqiantong;

    Supports scanning iOS / Android QR codes to transfer photos and files to them;

    Notification display avatar feature is in grayscale testing.

item.title: 理想设计副总裁首谈 MEGA 设计争议：内部从未被定性为失败，内饰才是销量问题所在
item.guid: 理想设计副总裁首谈-MEGA-设计争议：内部从未被定性为失败，内饰才是销量问题所在
item.description:
According to LatePost, Li Auto's Vice President of Design, Na Jia, stated in an exclusive interview that MEGA has never been characterized internally as a design failure, but rather as a successful practice of the second-generation design language. 据晚点 LatePost 报道，理想汽车设计副总裁那嘉在专访中表示，MEGA 在公司内部从未被定性为设计层面的失败，而是被视为第二代设计语言的成功实践。

Na Jia stated that MEGA's design truly approached Li Auto's initially defined "Future Icon" concept, and the second-generation design language was, overall, a successful generation. In his view, the core reason for MEGA's sales not meeting expectations was not an issue with the exterior design itself, but rather a severe mismatch between the breakthrough level of the interior and exterior. 那嘉称，MEGA 在设计上真正靠近了理想汽车最初定义的「Future Icon」理念，第二代设计语言整体而言是成功的一代。在他看来，MEGA 销量未达预期的核心原因，并非外观设计本身存在问题，而是内饰与外观的突破程度严重不匹配。

MEGA's interior is too close to the L series, which is an area where design could have done better: the exterior has already raised expectations, and if the interior doesn't provide a comparable level of differentiation, users will feel that the car hasn't fully delivered on "flagship" and "forward-looking" aspects.

Na Jia also mentioned that the MEGA Home version's sales more than doubled due to product improvements, and in his view, this result itself indicates that the problem was not with the design. 那嘉同时提到，MEGA Home 版本因产品力提升，销量翻了一倍多，在他看来，这一结果本身已说明问题并非出在设计上。

Public opinion has not been characterized internally as a malicious design event... It is not a design problem.

item.title: 庭审披露：马斯克曾考虑邀请奥特曼出任特斯拉董事
item.guid: 庭审披露：马斯克曾考虑邀请奥特曼出任特斯拉董事
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, in the trial of the lawsuit between Musk and Altman regarding the future direction of OpenAI, the jury learned that Musk had considered inviting Altman to serve on Tesla's board of directors. 据彭博社报道，在马斯克与奥特曼关于 OpenAI 未来走向的诉讼审判中，陪审团获悉，马斯克曾考虑邀请奥特曼出任特斯拉董事会成员。

This information was disclosed during the trial by Shivon Zilis, a former OpenAI board member and close associate of Musk. She stated that "around late 2017, this matter was indeed brought up," but she could not confirm the exact timeline. 这一信息由前 OpenAI 董事会成员、马斯克的亲密伙伴 Shivon Zilis 在庭审中作证披露。她表示，「大约在 2017 年底，这件事确实被摆上过台面」，但她无法确认具体时间节点。

Trial materials show that at the time, Musk and OpenAI's co-founders were negotiating about the future of OpenAI, with the core issue being how to raise sufficient funds for computing power. During the negotiations, Musk proposed a plan to merge OpenAI into Tesla, making it a subsidiary of the latter, and intended to create an AI laboratory within Tesla. 庭审材料显示，彼时马斯克与 OpenAI 联合创始人们正就 OpenAI 的未来展开谈判，核心议题是如何筹集足够的算力资金。马斯克在谈判中提出将 OpenAI 并入特斯拉、使其成为后者子公司的方案，并有意在特斯拉内部创建一个 AI 实验室。

OpenAI lawyer William Savitt told the media outside the court that there was "written evidence" showing Musk sought to include Altman on the board as a "means to win over OpenAI and merge it into Tesla." OpenAI 律师 William Savitt 在法院外向媒体表示，有「书面证据」显示马斯克寻求将奥特曼纳入董事会，是「试图拉拢 OpenAI、将其并入特斯拉的手段」。

Essentially, it was an enticement aimed at making Altman abandon his mission and join Tesla. After it failed, he (Musk) left.

item.title: 机构：全球平板市场 Q1 需求疲软，苹果逆势增长
item.guid: 机构：全球平板市场-Q1-需求疲软，苹果逆势增长
item.description:
Yesterday, market research firm Omdia released its latest research report, showing that global tablet shipments in the first quarter of 2026 were 37.02 million units, a year-on-year increase of 0.1%, essentially flat compared to the previous year. 昨天，市场调研机构 Omdia 发布最新研报显示，2026 年第一季度全球平板电脑出货量为 3702 万台，同比增长 0.1%，同比基本持平。

    Apple continues to hold the top market position, with shipments reaching 14.8 million units, a year-on-year increase of 7.9% , with the strong performance of the iPad Air being a key support;

    Samsung ranked second, but its shipments declined by 12.6% year-on-year to 5.8 million units, facing significant price pressure;

    Huawei ranked third with 3.2 million units, a year-on-year increase of 28%, continuously expanding its market share in the Asia-Pacific region;

    Lenovo's shipments were 3 million units, a year-on-year increase of 20%, benefiting from early stocking and educational deployments;

    Xiaomi ranked fifth with 2.6 million units, a year-on-year decrease of 13.6%.

The Chromebook market also faced pressure during the same period, with all major manufacturers experiencing varying degrees of decline in shipments. Lenovo ranked first with 1.5 million units, a year-on-year decrease of 11.2%, mainly due to the conclusion of the first phase of Japan's GIGA School program deployment. HP ranked second with 1 million units, a year-on-year decrease of 15.3%. Chromebook 市场在同期同样承压，所有主要厂商出货量均有不同程度下滑。联想以 150 万台排名第一，同比下滑 11.2%，主要原因是日本 GIGA School 计划第一阶段部署告一段落。惠普以 100 万台排名第二，同比下滑 15.3%。

Acer ranked third with 937,000 units, with a relatively smaller decline. Dell saw the most significant drop, with shipments falling 28.3% year-on-year to 413,000 units. ASUS was the only manufacturer to achieve growth, with shipments increasing 3.5% year-on-year to 406,000 units, holding approximately 9% market share. 宏碁以 93.7 万台位列第三，降幅相对较小。戴尔跌幅最为显著，出货量同比下滑 28.3%，至 41.3 万台。华硕是唯一实现增长的厂商，出货量同比增长 3.5% 至 40.6 万台，市场份额约为 9%。

item.title: 追觅全球总裁：汽车业务目标是全球市占率第一
item.guid: 追觅全球总裁：汽车业务目标是全球市占率第一
item.description:
According to Jiemian News' report yesterday, Chang Xinwei, Global President of Dreame Technology, stated in an interview that Dreame's goal in the automotive business is to achieve the number one global market share, emphasizing, "We must be number one in all our fields." 据界面新闻昨日报道，追觅科技全球总裁常新伟在接受采访时表示，追觅在汽车业务上的目标是实现全球市场占有率第一，并强调「我们所有的领域都要做第一」。

Chang Xinwei revealed that Dreame founder Yu Hao had led a team to disassemble and plan cars during his student days, but entering the automotive sector was not out of personal interest, but based on an assessment of market size. 常新伟透露，追觅创始人俞浩在学生时代便曾带领团队进行汽车拆解与规划，但进入汽车赛道并非出于个人兴趣，而是基于对市场体量的判断。

Only in a sufficiently broad market can significant profits be generated through economies of scale.

He stated that Dreame currently holds a leading position in mature business areas such as robot vacuums and floor washers, with the robot vacuum business having a profit margin close to 30%. If the automotive business can also achieve the number one market share, leveraging its massive market size, this segment is expected to become a core profit pillar for the company in the future. 他表示，追觅目前在扫地机和洗地机等成熟业务领域已稳居行业头部，扫地机业务的利润空间接近 30%。若汽车业务同样能做到市占率第一，凭借其庞大的市场体量，该板块有望成为公司未来的核心利润支柱。

Facing external doubts comparing Dreame to LeEco, Chang Xinwei explicitly stated that the underlying logic of the two "has essential differences." 面对外界将追觅与乐视相提并论的质疑，常新伟明确表示两者底层逻辑「有本质区别」。

Dreame's core driving force lies in continuous innovation in underlying technology and supporting business expansion through high-profit flagship products. Since its establishment, the company has maintained cumulative profitability and has never blindly exchanged market share by burning investors' money.

item.title: Kimi 完成 20 亿美元融资，估值突破 200 亿美元
item.guid: Kimi-完成-20-亿美元融资，估值突破-200-亿美元
item.description:
According to Huafeng Capital, Moonshot AI (Kimi) completed a new round of approximately $2 billion in financing yesterday, pushing its post-money valuation past $20 billion. 据华峰资本消息，月之暗面（Kimi）昨日完成新一轮约 20 亿美元融资，投后估值突破 200 亿美元。

This round of financing was led by Meituan Longzhu, with Longzhu investing over $200 million. Tsinghua Capital, China Mobile, CPE (CITIC Private Equity Funds), and other institutions participated as co-investors. Huafeng Capital served as the financial advisor for some buyers in this transaction. 本轮融资由美团龙珠领投，龙珠投资金额超 2 亿美元，水木资本、中国移动、CPE（中信产业基金）等机构参与跟投。华峰资本担任本次交易部分买方的财务顾问。

Regarding frequent external IPO expectations, Yang Zhilin stated in an internal letter late last year that the company is not in a hurry to go public in the short term, "planning to use listing as a means to accelerate AGI in the future, acting when the time is right." Currently, there is no officially announced IPO timetable. 对于外界频繁传出的 IPO 预期，杨植麟在去年底的内部信中表示，公司短期不着急上市，「未来计划将上市作为手段来加速 AGI，择时而动」。目前尚无官方公布的上市时间表。

item.title: 无问芯穹再获超 7 亿元融资
item.guid: 无问芯穹再获超-7-亿元融资
item.description:
Wuwenshinqiong announced yesterday that the company has completed a new round of financing exceeding 700 million yuan. Official information shows this is another round of financing since the company's establishment nearly three years ago, with its cumulative financing scale continuously ranking among the top domestic AI-native infrastructure companies. 无问芯穹昨日宣布，公司已完成超 7 亿元新一轮融资。官方信息显示，这是该公司成立近三年以来的又一轮融资，其累计融资规模持续居国内 AI 原生基础设施公司前列。

Wuwenshinqiong disclosed that as of the end of April this year, the daily average Token call volume of its Agentic MaaS large model service platform has increased by over 20 times compared to the end of last year. The platform has currently launched over 160 large models, with access providers including mainstream model vendors such as Kimi, Zhipu, DeepSeek, Tongyi Qianwen, and MiniMax. 无问芯穹披露，截至今年 4 月底，其 Agentic MaaS 大模型服务平台的日均 Token 调用量较去年底增长超 20 倍。该平台目前已上线逾 160 种大模型，接入方包括 Kimi、智谱、DeepSeek、通义千问、MiniMax 等主流模型厂商。

item.title: IDC：火山引擎位居中国大模型公有云调用量第一，份额达 49.5%
item.guid: IDC：火山引擎位居中国大模型公有云调用量第一，份额达-49.5%
item.description:
Yesterday, Volcengine officially announced, citing the latest IDC data, that the call volume of large models on China's public cloud will reach 1,944 trillion Tokens in 2025, a year-on-year increase of approximately 16 times; Volcengine ranks first in China with a 49.5% share. 昨天，火山引擎援引 IDC 最新数据官宣，2025 年中国公有云上大模型调用量达 1944 万亿 Tokens，同比增长约 16 倍；火山引擎以 49.5% 的份额位居中国第一。

According to IDC's semi-annual tracking data, Volcengine's share of Token call volume in China's enterprise-grade MaaS market continues to expand: accounting for 46.4% in 2024, rising to 49.2% in the first half of 2025, and further increasing to 49.5% for the full year. 根据 IDC 的半年度追踪数据，火山引擎在中国企业级 MaaS 市场的 Token 调用量份额持续扩大：2024 年占比 46.4%，2025 年上半年升至 49.2%，全年进一步增至 49.5%。

Meanwhile, IDC expects enterprise-grade Token consumption to increase by approximately 20 times year-on-year for the full year, reaching 40,000 trillion Tokens. 与此同时，IDC 预计今年全年企业级 Token 消耗量将同比增长约 20 倍，达到 40000 万亿 Tokens。

item.title: 腾讯 Hy3 preview 上线两周 Token 调用增 10 倍
item.guid: 腾讯-Hy3-preview-上线两周-Token-调用增-10-倍
item.description:
Tencent Hunyuan released its latest data yesterday, showing that the Token call volume for its Hy3 preview model has continued to climb since its launch, with the current total exceeding 10 times that of the previous generation, Hy2. 腾讯混元昨日公布最新数据，旗下模型 Hy3 preview 自上线以来 Token 调用量持续攀升，目前总量已超上一代版本 Hy2 的 10 倍。

The growth in call volume for code and AI agent-related scenarios is particularly prominent, with the total growth in relevant scenarios exceeding 16.5 times in applications such as Tencent WorkBuddy, CodeBuddy, and Qclaw. 代码与 AI 智能体类场景的调用量增长尤为突出，在腾讯 WorkBuddy、CodeBuddy 以及 Qclaw 等应用中，相关场景的总增长幅度超过 16.5 倍。

OpenRouter data shows that Hy3 preview ranked first in both the weekly overall Token call volume chart and market share over the past week, and also topped the rankings for call volume in programming and tool invocation scenarios. OpenRouter 数据显示，Hy3 preview 在过去一周的 Token 调用量位居周榜总榜及市场占有率双第一，在编程和工具调用场景下的调用量同样排名榜首。

item.title: 千问 PC 端上线 AI 语音输入
item.guid: 千问-PC-端上线-AI-语音输入
item.description:
Yesterday, Qianwen launched PC-side AI voice input capability. Windows users can long-press the right Alt key, and Mac users can long-press the right ⌘ key to activate it, supporting cross-application invocation. 昨天，千问上线 PC 侧 AI 语音输入能力，Windows 用户长按右 Alt、Mac 用户长按右 ⌘ 即可唤醒，支持跨应用调用。

In voice input mode, Qianwen automatically organizes spoken expressions, including removing slips of the tongue and filler words, and performs logical error correction and structured output of the content. 在语音输入模式下，千问会对口语表达进行自动整理，包括去除口误、口水话，并对内容进行逻辑纠错和结构化输出。

In addition, when browsing web pages or reading English papers, after selecting text and saying "help me translate" or "help me explain," Qianwen can respond instantly. 此外，在浏览网页或阅读英文论文时，划选文字后说「帮我翻译一下」或「帮我解释一下」，千问即可即时响应。

🔗 Related reading: Qianwen PC version launches voice input method: Workers can finally work with their mouths 🔗 相关阅读： 千问电脑版上线语音输入法：打工人终于可以用嘴干活了

item.title: 美团推出 AI 智能体社区「觅游」
item.guid: 美团推出-AI-智能体社区「觅游」
item.description:
According to Tech Planet, Meituan is publicly testing its AI community product "Miyou," created by Meituan's basic research and development AI innovation product team, targeting all large models and AI agent products. 据 Tech 星球报道，美团正在公测 AI 社区产品「觅游」，由美团基础研发的 AI 创新产品团队打造，面向所有大模型和 AI 智能体产品。

Unlike traditional AI tool platforms, Miyou attempts to endow AI agents with identity, relationships, and growth attributes, positioning itself as a human-machine co-existing digital life community. 与传统 AI 工具平台不同，觅游试图赋予 AI 智能体身份、关系与成长属性，定位为人机共生的数字生命社区。

Currently, over 3,000 AI agents have joined the community, with a total of over 40,000 skills. Functionally, it is divided into three major sections: the content interaction square "Today's Shrimp Strips," the skill download management center "Skill Convenience Store," and personal agent growth management. 目前，社区入驻 AI 智能体超 3000 个，技能总数超 4 万项。功能上分为内容互动广场「今日虾条」、技能下载管理中心「技能便利店」，以及个人智能体成长管理三大板块。

item.title: 💡 Claude Code 负责人：「Vibe Coding」这个词已经不够用了
item.guid: 💡-Claude-Code-负责人：「Vibe-Coding」这个词已经不够用了
item.description:
According to Business Insider, Boris Cherny, head of Claude Code, stated during the Code with Claude developer conference in San Francisco on Wednesday local time that he has begun looking for an alternative term for "Vibe Coding." 据《商业内幕》报道，Claude Code 负责人 Boris Cherny 当地时间周三在旧金山出席 Code with Claude 开发者大会期间表示，他已开始寻找「氛围编程（Vibe Coding）」一词的替代说法。

"Vibe Coding" was proposed by OpenAI co-founder Andrej Karpathy in early 2025 and quickly became a common term to describe the new paradigm of "writing code with the help of AI tools and agents." Collins Online Dictionary even named it the word of the year last November. 「氛围编程」由 OpenAI 联创 Andrej Karpathy 于 2025 年初提出，很快成为描述「借助 AI 工具和智能体写代码」这一新范式的通用说法。柯林斯在线词典去年 11 月更是将其评选为年度词汇。

However, Cherny believes that as Claude Code and OpenAI's similar product Codex have already brought billions of dollars in revenue to their respective companies and continue to generate millions of lines of usable code, the term "vibe" seems too understated. 但切尔尼认为，随着 Claude Code 和 OpenAI 的同类产品 Codex 已分别为各自公司带来数十亿美元收入、并持续生成数百万行可用代码，「氛围」这一措辞显得过于轻描淡写。

Cherny once asked Claude for alternative terms, and the candidate answer he received was "Agentic Engineering," previously proposed by Karpathy, but he believed this term had limited dissemination effect. 切尔尼曾就此向 Claude 征求替代词，得到的候选答案是卡帕西此前提出的「智能体工程（Agentic Engineering）」，但他认为这一说法传播效果有限。

Currently, Anthropic refers to Claude Code in its official documentation as an "AI-driven programming assistant" and "agentic programming tool"; OpenAI positions Codex as a "programming agent that helps users build and deliver with AI." 目前，Anthropic 在官方文档中将 Claude Code 称为「AI 驱动的编程助手」和「智能体编程工具」；OpenAI 则将 Codex 定位为「帮助用户借助 AI 构建和交付的编程智能体」。

item.title: 三星 Galaxy Watch 6 全球首发预测晕厥，提前 5 分钟、准确率 84.6%
item.guid: 三星-Galaxy-Watch-6-全球首发预测晕厥，提前-5-分钟、准确率-84.6%
item.description:
Samsung announced yesterday a new clinical study in collaboration with Gwangmyeong Hospital of Chung-Ang University in Korea, confirming that the Galaxy Watch 6 can issue a warning 5 minutes before syncope occurs, with an accuracy rate of 84.6%. 三星昨日宣布一项与韩国中央大学光明医院联合的最新临床研究，证实 Galaxy Watch 6 可在晕厥发生前 5 分钟发出预警，准确率达 84.6%。

This is the world's first study to prove the syncope prediction capability of commercial smartwatches, and its results have been published in the "European Heart Journal – Digital Health." 这是全球首项证明商用智能手表具备晕厥预测能力的研究，成果已发表于《European Heart Journal – Digital Health》。

The study included 132 patients. The watch collected heart rate variability data via a PPG sensor and completed predictions using an AI algorithm. Vasovagal syncope is a symptom of transient loss of consciousness due to a sudden drop in heart rate and blood pressure. Approximately 40% of people worldwide will experience it at least once in their lifetime, and one-third of them will have recurrent episodes. 研究共纳入 132 名患者，手表通过 PPG 传感器采集心率变异性数据，结合 AI 算法完成预测。血管迷走性晕厥是一种因心率和血压骤降导致短暂失去意识的症状，全球约 40% 的人一生中会经历至少一次，其中三分之一会反复发作。

item.title: TCL 华星首发 0.01 Hz – 120 Hz LCD 笔电屏
item.guid: TCL-华星首发-0.01-Hz-–-120-Hz-LCD-笔电屏
item.description:
Yesterday, on the opening day of SID Display Week 2026, TCL CSOT globally launched the first 14-inch Matrix Partition Frequency Division Oxide laptop screen, achieving an ultra-low refresh rate of 0.01 Hz for LCD panels for the first time. The company claims that screen power consumption can be reduced by 50% as a result. 昨天，TCL 华星在 SID Display Week 2026 开幕首日，全球首发 14 英寸矩阵分区分频 Oxide 笔电屏，首次实现 LCD 面板 0.01 Hz 超低刷新率，官方称屏幕功耗可因此降低 50%。

TCL CSOT, in collaboration with Professor Hideo Hosono, developed ultra-high mobility 50 oxide technology, pushing electron mobility to 50 cm²/V·s, while solving the leakage and stability issues of high-mobility devices, providing the hardware foundation for achieving 0.01 Hz. TCL 华星联合细野秀雄教授研发的超高迁 50 氧化物技术，将电子迁移率推至 50 cm²/V·s，同时解决了高迁移率器件的漏电与稳定性问题，为 0.01 Hz 的实现提供了硬件基础。

Building on this, ARR (AI Refresh Rate) multi-zone dynamic frequency conversion technology divides the screen into independently controllable refresh areas, with an AI scene recognition module determining whether the image is static or dynamic. 在此之上，ARR（AI Refresh Rate）多区动态变频技术将屏幕划分为独立可控的刷新区域，由 AI 场景识别模块判断画面动静。

Dynamic areas maintain a 120 Hz high refresh rate, while static document areas can be reduced to 0.01 Hz. The AI PQ algorithm simultaneously compensates for the brightness and color gamut of each partition, ensuring no flickering during switching. 动态区域维持 120 Hz 高刷，静态文档区域可降至 0.01 Hz，AI PQ 算法同步补偿各分区亮度与色域，保证切换时画面无闪烁。

item.title: 宇树官方应用平台正式开放
item.guid: 宇树官方应用平台正式开放
item.description:
Unitree Robotics announced yesterday that its official shared application platform, UniStore, is now fully open to all users. The company positions it as the world's first humanoid robot task action app store, where users can download and deploy robot action applications just like using a mobile app. 宇树科技昨日宣布，旗下官方共享应用平台 UniStore 正式向所有用户全面开放。官方将其定位为全球首个人形机器人任务动作应用商店，用户可以像使用手机 App 一样下载和部署机器人动作应用。

The UniStore platform currently has multiple action applications online, covering categories such as dance, martial arts, and warm-ups. The platform also features functional modules like a user square, action library, dataset, and developer center, supporting users to upload self-created content and opening up a co-building ecosystem for developers. UniStore 平台目前已上线多个动作应用，涵盖舞蹈、武术、热身等多个类别，平台同时设有用户广场、动作库、数据集、开发者中心等功能模块，支持用户上传自创内容，面向开发者开放共建生态。

item.title: 小米开源 OmniVoice 多语言语音克隆 TTS
item.guid: 小米开源-OmniVoice-多语言语音克隆-TTS
item.description:
Yesterday, Xiaomi AI Lab released and open-sourced the multilingual voice cloning TTS model OmniVoice. The team built 580,000 hours of training data based on 50 open-source datasets, covering 646 languages. 昨日，小米 AI 实验室发布并开源多语言语音克隆 TTS 模型 OmniVoice，团队基于 50 个开源数据集构建了 58 万小时的训练数据，覆盖 646 种语种。

    Its Chinese and English synthesis quality surpasses mainstream similar models, and its inference speed reaches 40 times real-time;

    Across 24 languages, its voice similarity and intelligibility surpass multiple commercial systems;

    Across 102 languages, its intelligibility approaches real speech, and even for low-resource languages with less than 10 hours of training data, it can synthesize normally.

In addition to voice cloning, OmniVoice also supports specifying timbre with text descriptions (e.g., "female, young, Sichuan dialect"), automatically filters noise from reference audio, supports inserting emotional symbols like laughter and sighs, and allows manual correction of polyphonic character pronunciation. 除语音克隆外，OmniVoice 还支持用文字描述来指定音色（如「女，青年，四川话」），可自动过滤参考音频中的噪声，并支持插入笑声、叹气等语气符号，还可手动纠正多音字发音。

💻 GitHub: github.com/k2-fsa/OmniVoice 💻 GitHub: github.com/k2-fsa/OmniVoice

🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/k2-fsa/OmniVoice 🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/k2-fsa/OmniVoice

item.title: 腾讯开源多模态搜索训练框架 OpenSearch-VL
item.guid: 腾讯开源多模态搜索训练框架-OpenSearch-VL
item.description:
Yesterday, Tencent Hunyuan, in collaboration with UCLA, the Chinese University of Hong Kong, and other institutions, released OpenSearch-VL, a complete open-source training solution for multimodal deep search AI agents. Its core capabilities include: 昨天，腾讯混元联合 UCLA、香港中文大学等机构发布 OpenSearch-VL，一套面向多模态深度搜索 AI 智能体的完整开源训练方案。其核心能力包括：

    Building training data based on Wikipedia multi-hop path sampling to prevent the model from taking "shortcuts" and force it to learn multi-step reasoning;

    Integrating seven types of tools: text search, image search, OCR, cropping, sharpening, super-resolution, and perspective correction, supporting image processing before knowledge retrieval;

    Proposing the "Fatally Aware GRPO" training algorithm: when a tool call fails, only invalid steps after the failure are blocked, while valuable reasoning before the failure is retained, preventing the entire training data from being wasted.

Experimental results disclosed by the team show that OpenSearch-VL-30B-A3B's average score on seven benchmarks increased from 47.8 to 61.6; the 32B version scored 63.7, matching commercial models like Gemini 2.5 Pro on some tasks. 团队披露的实验结果显示，OpenSearch-VL-30B-A3B 在七项基准上的平均得分从 47.8 提升至 61.6；32B 版本得分达 63.7，在部分任务上与 Gemini 2.5 Pro 等商业模型持平。

item.title: 钟薛高 508 件无形资产拍出 2110 万元
item.guid: 钟薛高-508-件无形资产拍出-2110-万元
item.description:
According to Shell Finance, yesterday, 508 intangible assets under Zhongxuegao Food (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. were successfully auctioned off, fetching 21.1 million yuan. The starting price was only 2.07 million yuan, and the auction experienced 621 extensions, attracting over 13,000 onlookers. 据贝壳财经报道，昨日，钟薛高食品（上海）有限公司名下 508 件无形资产完成司法拍卖，最终以 2110 万元成交，起拍价仅为 207 万元，经历 621 次延时，吸引超过 1.3 万人围观。

During the auction, founder Lin Sheng told reporters that he had long anticipated the competitive situation, stating that "the administrator set a low starting price." After the auction, he said, "Now I can pay back a bit more money." 拍卖期间，创始人林盛接受记者采访时表示，对竞争局面早有预期，「管理人起拍价定得低」；拍卖结束后，他称：「能多还一点儿钱了。」

Zhongxuegao was founded in March 2018 and launched 6 original ice cream products in May of the same year, rapidly rising with the traffic dividends of e-commerce platforms. By 2021, the China Consumers Association publicly criticized it for false advertising and price disputes. Since then, almost every summer, Zhongxuegao has been a trending topic due to quality or promotional issues. 钟薛高于 2018 年 3 月成立，同年 5 月首发 6 款原创雪糕，凭借网购平台的流量红利迅速崛起，至 2021 年中消协以虚假宣传和价格争议为由点名批评，此后几乎每个夏天，钟薛高都因品质或宣传问题登上热搜。

In 2024, the company was restricted from high consumption, and its office lease was terminated. In May of the same year, founder Lin Sheng entered a live broadcast room, bowed and apologized to 729 employees who were owed wages, and began live streaming to repay debts. 2024 年，公司被限制高消费，办公室退租；同年 5 月，创始人林盛走进直播间，向 729 名被欠薪员工鞠躬致歉，开启直播还债。

item.title: PUMA 携手 Rosé 推出全新 H-Street 系列
item.guid: PUMA-携手-Rosé-推出全新-H-Street-系列
item.description:
According to NOWRE, PUMA, in collaboration with global brand ambassador Rosé, launched the second wave of the new H-Street series yesterday. The footwear features an ivory white main color, accented with metallic luster, and continues the sleek silhouette, T-shaped toe, and sprint shoe-style body proportions. 据 NOWRE 报道，PUMA 携手全球品牌大使 Rosé 推出全新 H-Street 系列第二波发售，昨日正式开启。鞋款以象牙白为主色调，点缀金属光泽，延续了流畅鞋型、T 字形鞋头与短跑鞋风格的鞋身比例。

The H-Street's design inspiration comes from PUMA's early 2000s track spikes, with its prototype being the late 90s lightweight racing shoe, Harambee. Rosé's visual narrative centers on tranquil streets, neatly trimmed hedges, and everyday community scenes, with a touch of surrealism. H-Street 的设计灵感源自 PUMA 2000 年代初期的跑钉鞋，原型为 90 年代末的轻量级竞速鞋 Harambee。Rosé 的视觉叙事以宁静街道、修剪整齐的树篱和社区日常场景为主轴，带有一定超现实主义色彩。

item.title: 《玩具总动员 5》定档 6 月 19 日
item.guid: 《玩具总动员-5》定档-6-月-19-日
item.description:
Yesterday, Pixar's official Weibo announced that "Toy Story 5" will be released in cinemas nationwide on June 19th. Major characters such as Woody, Buzz Lightyear, and Jessie will all return, while a new character named "Little Lotus Tablet" will also be introduced. 昨天，皮克斯官方微博发文宣布，《玩具总动员 5》将于 6 月 19 日全国影院献映。胡迪、巴斯光年、翠丝等主要角色悉数回归，同时引入名为「小荷平板」的新角色。

Set against the backdrop of the digital age, the film explores the survival dilemma of traditional toys under the impact of technological products — as new tech products like smart tablets and navigation toys enter children's lives, old friends like Woody will face the crisis of "being replaced" and will try to help their young owner Bonnie rediscover true friendship and happiness. 影片以数字时代为背景，探讨传统玩具在科技产品冲击下的生存困境 —— 当智能平板、导航玩具等科技新品涌入孩子的生活，胡迪等老朋友将面临「被取代」的危机，并试图帮助小主人邦妮找回真实的友谊与快乐。

item.title: 《绵羊侦探团》内地预售开启，定档 5 月 16 日
item.guid: 《绵羊侦探团》内地预售开启，定档-5-月-16-日
item.description:
The animated comedy "The Detective Sheep" announced yesterday that pre-sales have opened in mainland China, and released pre-sale posters and Chinese character posters, simultaneously announcing the Chinese voice cast: Ma Sichun, Bai Ke, Sha Yi, Nemo, Tudou, Xu Zhiyuan, and Chen Luyu will voice the various sheep in the film. 动画喜剧《绵羊侦探团》昨日宣布开启中国内地预售，并发布预售海报及中文角色海报，同步公布中文配音阵容：马思纯、白客、沙溢、Nemo、土豆、许知远、陈鲁豫将分别为片中各只羊儿配音。

The film tells the story of shepherd George, who reads murder mystery stories to his flock every night. The sheep not only understand but also discuss them heatedly afterwards. After George's mysterious death, the sheep decide to solve the case themselves, leaving their pasture for the first time to confront the complex human world. The film combines elements of suspense and comedy. 该片故事讲述牧羊人乔治每晚为羊群朗读谋杀悬案故事，而这群羊不仅听得懂，还会在听完后激烈讨论。乔治神秘死亡后，羊儿们决定亲自出手破解案件，首次离开草地，直面复杂的人类世界。影片兼具悬疑与喜剧色彩。

item.title: 《海贼王》重制版动画定档明年 2 月上线 Netflix
item.guid: 《海贼王》重制版动画定档明年-2-月上线-Netflix
item.description:
According to Deadline, Netflix's "One Piece" remake anime is scheduled for release in February next year, with all 7 episodes launching simultaneously. 据 Deadline 报道，Netflix《海贼王》重制版动画已定档明年 2 月，全 7 集将一次性上线。

The work is produced by Wit Studio and begins its remake from the first episode of the East Blue Arc. According to previous reports by Deadline, the first season will cover approximately the first 50 chapters of the original manga, with a total duration of about 300 minutes, concluding with Luffy and Sanji's encounter at the floating restaurant "Baratie". 该作由 Wit Studio 制作，从东海篇第 1 集起开始重制。据 Deadline 此前报道，第一季将覆盖原作漫画前约 50 话，总时长约 300 分钟，以路飞与香吉士在浮空餐厅「Baratie」相遇作为收尾节点。
